name: Kaito Kiyoshi
bio: Individual freedom is key to personal growth. Embracing diversity is the foundation of a healthy society.

name: Akira Kōjin
bio: Collective well-being is the ultimate goal. Unity in diversity ensures a prosperous society.

name: Shinji Shizuka
bio: Finding balance between individual needs and societal harmony is the key to a thriving community. Compromise and understanding are the hallmarks of wisdom.

name: 賢者2
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
